components.header: Solid white background, sticky top-0, z-50, border-b border-border. Use flexbox. Left: Logo and Tagline (tagline should be text-muted, tiny). Right: Beta Feedback button.
components.sidebar: Fixed width (w-80), h-[calc(100vh-header_height)], overflow-y-auto, border-r border-border, bg-white p-6. Use collapsible groups for filter sections.
components.sliders: Use Shadcn UI Slider. Thumb and active track should be primary color (#0F172A).
components.quick_filters: Buttons for 'Value Investing', 'Growth Stock', 'Dividend Hunters'. Style as secondary or outline buttons.
components.table: Use Shadcn UI Table. Ticker symbol must use IBM Plex Mono. Positive numbers (e.g., Div Yield > 5%) should be emerald green (#10B981). Interactive row hover (bg-slate-50). cursor-pointer on rows.
components.company_detail_sheet: Use Shadcn Sheet (Slide-over from right). Header: Company Profile. Body: 2 charts.
components.charts: Use Recharts (Shadcn Chart). 1. Bar chart: Revenue (muted blue) vs Net Income (emerald). 2. Line chart: ROE & PER trend over 3 years.
components.premium_cta: Card at the bottom of the sidebar. Dark blue background with the provided abstract texture. High contrast white text. Includes email input and submit button.

premium_cta_bg.description: Abstract dark blue financial data background to be used as an overlay/background for the Premium Waitlist CTA box.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Add Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Install @phosphor-icons/react for icons and recharts for charts.
Create a static mock dataset of at least 15-20 IHSG companies with Balance Sheet, Income Statement, Key Ratios, and Dividend history. Store it in a JS file.
Layout: Sticky header top, main content split into left sidebar (w-80) and right main area (flex-1).
Sidebar must contain the collapsible filter groups (Valuasi, Profitabilitas, Musim Dividen, Tema Cuan).
Implement state logic: Filter state must reactively update the table data without page reload.
Preset buttons (Tema Cuan) should instantly update slider states and filter the table.
Results table should have sortable column headers. Tickers in monospace font. Apply emerald green color conditionally to strong positive metrics.
Add a timestamp 'Data terakhir diperbarui: [Current Date & Time]' in a subtle text block.
When a table row is clicked, open a Shadcn Sheet (right side). Show the company profile and render the Mini Financials (Bar Chart) and Key Ratio Trend (Line Chart).
Build the Premium Waitlist CTA inside the sidebar using the provided image as a textured background (use bg-cover, bg-center, mix-blend-overlay or similar to ensure text is readable).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes.
